feature: MatchWhere5 - Filter on predicate resulting in null

scenarios.id: MatchWhere5 - Filter on predicate resulting in null-[1] Filter out on null
MatchWhere5 - Filter on predicate resulting in null-[2] Filter out on null if the AND'd predicate evaluates to false
scenarios.description: [2] Filter out on null if the AND'd predicate evaluates to false
scenarios.query:
MATCH (:Root {name: 'x'})-->(i:TextNode)
WHERE i.var > 'te' AND i:TextNode
RETURN i

scenarios.id: MatchWhere5 - Filter on predicate resulting in null-[3] Filter out on null if the AND'd predicate evaluates to true
scenarios.description: [3] Filter out on null if the AND'd predicate evaluates to true
scenarios.query:
MATCH (:Root {name: 'x'})-->(i:TextNode)
WHERE i.var > 'te' AND i.var IS NOT NULL
RETURN i

scenarios.id: MatchWhere5 - Filter on predicate resulting in null-[4] Do not filter out on null if the OR'd predicate evaluates to true
scenarios.description: [4] Do not filter out on null if the OR'd predicate evaluates to true
scenarios.query:
MATCH (:Root {name: 'x'})-->(i)
WHERE i.var > 'te' OR i.var IS NOT NULL
RETURN i
